headline: Is Lockheed Martin Strengthening Its Sonar Defense Capabilities?

headline: Elon Musk Is Now Worth More Than Jeff Bezos, Sergey Brin And Larry Ellison Combined After SPCX Rally

headline: Elon Musk's Net Worth Exceeds $1.3 Trillion As SpaceX Surpasses Microsoft, Amazon In Market Value
summary: SPCX's rally leads to Elon Musk surpassing $1.3 trillion as record-breaking IPO raises close to $86 billion.
